note: Italian tax parameters 2025. Sources: D.P.R. 917/1986 (TUIR), D.Lgs. 446/1997 (IRAP), D.P.R. 633/1972 (IVA), L. 197/2022 (Legge di Bilancio 2023), Legge di Bilancio 2025.

ires.label: IRES — Imposta sul Reddito delle Società
ires.note: Flat rate 24% on taxable corporate income (D.P.R. 917/1986 art. 77). Reduced IRES 15% for companies that reinvest profits and hire (regime IRES premiale, Legge Bilancio 2025, not yet in force for 2025).

irap.label: IRAP — Imposta Regionale sulle Attività Produttive
irap.note: Standard 3.9% (D.Lgs. 446/1997 art. 16). Regions may vary ±0.92pp. Abolita per persone fisiche/lavoratori autonomi dal 2022 (L. 234/2021).
irap.note_total: IRES 24% + IRAP 3.9% = 27.9% combined burden for standard companies

iva.label: IVA — Imposta sul Valore Aggiunto (VAT)
iva.note: Standard 22% (D.P.R. 633/1972). Ridotta 10%: alimentari, turismo, farmaci. Ridotta 5%: cooperative sociali. Super-ridotta 4%: generi di prima necessità, libri. Zero: esportazioni, operazioni intracomunitarie.

irpef.label: IRPEF — Imposta sul Reddito delle Persone Fisiche
irpef.note: Legge di Bilancio 2025 riforma strutturale: 3 aliquote (23%/35%/43%).

contributi_inps.label: INPS contributions for self-employed (artigiani/commercianti)
contributi_inps.note: 2025 rates. Gestione Separata 26.72% for non-enrolled (e.g. freelancers without other INPS coverage).

cedolare_secca.label: Cedolare secca — flat tax on residential rental income
cedolare_secca.note: Alternative to IRPEF on rental income; 21% standard, 10% for contratti a canone concordato.

ritenuta_acconto.label: Ritenuta d'acconto (withholding tax)
ritenuta_acconto.note: 20% on payments to self-employed professionals (D.P.R. 600/1973 art. 25).

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
